description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a robust and boxy body style, featuring a prominent front grille with a metallic finish and a gold bowtie emblem, likely indicating a Chevrolet Suburban. The vehicle has four side doors, large tinted windows, and a roof rack system for additional cargo. The wheels are sizable with a multi-spoke alloy design, and the tires are thick, suitable for both urban and off-road environments. The rear of the SUV includes a wide tailgate, red tail lights, and a subtle rear spoiler above the window. The exterior is finished in a uniform gray color, giving it a sleek and understated appearance.
description: A large, gray, boxy SUV with a metallic grille, roof rack, and multi-spoke alloy wheels, featuring four doors and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille with a gold bowtie emblem, wide hood, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, large windows, roof rack, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide tailgate, red tail lights, and rear window with a subtle spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the doors, windows, and wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke alloy wheels with a metallic finish
